channel.title: GitHub Assembly Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Assembly in GitHub

item.title: riscv/riscv-arch-test
item.description: The RISC-V Architectural Certification Tests (ACTs) are a set of assembly language tests designed to certify that a design faithfully implements the RISC-V specification.

item.title: bird-sanctuary/bluejay
item.description: 🐦 Digital ESC firmware for controlling brushless motors in multirotors
